name: Strawberry-Rhubarb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir all ingredients together until well combined.
2. Let the mixture stand for 15 minutes.
3. Place the prepared pie crust in an unbaked 9-inch pie dish.
4. Pour the filling into the crust and cover with a top crust or a sweet crumb mixture.
5. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 40 to 45 minutes, or until set.
